title: United States Wreckers Act
description: United States Wreckers Act (United States Wreckers Act). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the United States Wreckers Act .

provisions.title: Privilege granted
provisions.content: 2 United States vessels and wrecking appliances may salve any property wrecked, and may render aid and assistance including all necessary towing incident thereto to any vessels wrecked, disabled or in distress, in the waters of Canada contiguous to the United States.

provisions.title: Customs and coasting laws
provisions.content: 3 Nothing in the customs or coasting laws of Canada restricts the salving operations of the vessels or wrecking appliances referred to in section 2.

provisions.title: Duration of Act
provisions.content: 4 This Act ceases to be in force on a date to be fixed in a proclamation of the Governor General, which may be issued after the Governor General is advised that the reciprocal privilege with respect to Canadian vessels or wrecking appliances salving any property wrecked or aiding any vessels wrecked, disabled or distressed in United States waters contiguous to Canada has been withdrawn, revoked or rendered inoperative.
